title: pasania thomsonii
intro: Pasania thomsonii, also known as the Himalayan oak, is a species of tree in the family Lauraceae. The medicinal properties of Pasania thomsonii include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pasania thomsonii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and act as an antioxidant to protect the body from oxidative stress. Pasania thomsonii can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
